vpcs.label: node · overview + VPC-detail + focus
vpcs.note: off-diagram: ipv6 CIDRs, DNS support/hostnames, dhcpOptionsId, state

subnets.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
subnets.note: off-diagram: ipv6, availableIpCount, mapPublicIpOnLaunch, routeTableId, AZ-id

routeTables.label: edge · routes drawn as arrows (VD/FO); route rows in edge hover (OV)
routeTables.note: the route-table entity is panel-only; isMain, gatewayAssociations, per-route origin/state only in panel

natGateways.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
natGateways.note: off-diagram: state, full addresses[] (extra IPs, allocationId, privateIp)

elasticIps.label: edge · focus only (EIP→holder)
elasticIps.note: otherwise panel-only; privateIp, associationId, instanceId only in panel

networkAcls.label: panel-only — never on graph
networkAcls.note: entire entity incl. entries[] (the NACL rules) only in Details panel

securityGroups.label: node · VPC-detail + focus (rules as edges)
securityGroups.note: ingress/egress rule bodies appear only as edges or panel, not on the SG node; OV shows only an 'internet-open' badge on the VPC

networkInterfaces.label: panel-only — collection never drawn
networkInterfaces.note: ENI only appears as a ghost box if a route targets an eni-…; privateIps, publicIp, attachedTo, status all panel-only

vpcEndpoints.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
vpcEndpoints.note: off-diagram: full serviceName, state, routeTableIds, networkInterfaceIds, privateDnsEnabled, policyDocument

vpcEndpointServices.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
vpcEndpointServices.note: off-diagram: allowedPrincipals, acceptanceRequired, privateDnsName, supportedIpAddressTypes, AZs

prefixLists.label: panel-only — never on graph
prefixLists.note: cidrs, ownerId, maxEntries only in panel (a route may show the prefix-list id as text)

dhcpOptions.label: panel-only — never on graph
dhcpOptions.note: options map + vpcIds only in panel

peeringConnections.label: edge · overview (VPC↔VPC); node in focus/ghost in VD
peeringConnections.note: requester/accepter cidrBlocks, accountId, region only in title/route rows

transitGateways.label: node · overview + focus
transitGateways.note: off-diagram: amazonSideAsn, state, ownerId, default association/propagation RT ids

transitGatewayAttachments.label: edge · overview + focus (VPC↔TGW / TGW peering)
transitGatewayAttachments.note: the attachment entity is panel-only; subnetIds, associationRouteTableId, resourceOwnerId only in panel

transitGatewayRouteTables.label: panel-only — feeds TGW edge hover only
transitGatewayRouteTables.note: associations, propagations, isDefault* only in panel; routes shown only in the TGW-attachment edge hover

transitGatewayConnectPeers.label: node · focus only
transitGatewayConnectPeers.note: insideCidrBlocks, peerAddress, transitGatewayAddress, bgpAsn — focus view only

vpnConnections.label: edge · overview + VPC-detail + focus
vpnConnections.note: staticRoutes, staticRoutesOnly, category, local/remote CIDRs, tunnel statusMessage only in panel

dxConnections.label: node · overview (via its VIFs) + focus
dxConnections.note: connections with no VIF are panel-only; off-diagram: state, vlan, partnerName, lagId, ownerAccount

dxLags.label: node · focus only
dxLags.note: not on overview/VPC-detail; connectionsBandwidth, numberOfConnections, location only in panel

dxVirtualInterfaces.label: edge · overview (dxconn→DXGW/VGW); node in focus
dxVirtualInterfaces.note: bgpAsn, amazon/customer addresses, routeFilterPrefixes, bgpPeers only in panel/hover

loadBalancers.label: node · VPC-detail + focus (NOT on overview)
loadBalancers.note: HIGH-VALUE GAP: listeners (ports/protocols/SNI certs/routing rules), dnsName, subnetIds, AZs, securityGroupIds, state all panel-only

targetGroups.label: edge · LB→target association (VD/FO)
targetGroups.note: targetType and per-target health/AZ only in panel; entity itself panel-only

instances.label: node · VPC-detail + focus (capped 12/subnet)
instances.note: off-diagram: imageId, launchTime, platform, publicIp, availabilityZone; >12/subnet collapsed to a note

autoScalingGroups.label: node · focus only
autoScalingGroups.note: not on overview/VPC-detail; minSize, maxSize, desiredCapacity, subnetIds, targetGroupArns only in panel

lambdaFunctions.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
lambdaFunctions.note: off-diagram: description, roleArn (edge), vpcConfig detail; functionUrl only surfaced if authType=NONE

rdsInstances.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
rdsInstances.note: off-diagram: engineVersion, instanceClass, endpoint, publiclyAccessible, subnetGroupName

rdsClusters.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
rdsClusters.note: off-diagram: engineVersion, endpoint, readerEndpoint, multiAz, memberInstanceIds

elastiCacheReplicationGroups.label: node · focus only
elastiCacheReplicationGroups.note: not on overview/VPC-detail; description, status, clusterMode, failover, endpoints only in panel

efsFileSystems.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
efsFileSystems.note: off-diagram: encrypted, performanceMode, state, mount-target IPs/AZs

dynamoDbTables.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
dynamoDbTables.note: keys, encryption, streams, PITR, global-table replicas; cross-region replicas could later be edges

kmsKeys.label: node · overview (customer-managed only) + focus
kmsKeys.note: AWS-managed keys collapsed to a note; keyState, keyUsage, keySpec, multiRegion, extra aliases only in panel

acmCertificates.label: node · overview + VPC-detail + focus
acmCertificates.note: off-diagram: subjectAlternativeNames, renewalEligibility, notAfter (notAfter only in VD subtitle)

wafWebAcls.label: node · overview + VPC-detail + focus
wafWebAcls.note: off-diagram: defaultAction, capacity, rules[] statements, description

wafIpSets.label: panel-only — never on graph
wafIpSets.note: addresses, ipAddressVersion, description only in panel

resolverRules.label: node+edge · overview + VPC-detail + focus
resolverRules.note: only FORWARD rules drawn; ruleType, shareStatus, resolverEndpointId, vpcAssociationIds off-diagram

dnsFirewallRuleGroups.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
dnsFirewallRuleGroups.note: off-diagram: status, shareStatus, rules[] (domains, actions, blockResponse)

resolverQueryLogConfigs.label: panel-only — never on graph
resolverQueryLogConfigs.note: destinationArn, status, shareStatus, vpcIds only in panel

networkFirewalls.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
networkFirewalls.note: off-diagram: deleteProtection, logDestinations[], per-AZ endpoints[] detail

networkFirewallPolicies.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
networkFirewallPolicies.note: off-diagram: stateless/stateful default actions, statefulRuleOrder, tlsInspectionConfigurationArn

networkFirewallRuleGroups.label: node · VPC-detail + focus
networkFirewallRuleGroups.note: off-diagram: capacity, consumedCapacity, numberOfAssociations, actual stateless/stateful/Suricata/domain-list rule bodies

apiGatewayVpcLinks.label: node · focus only
apiGatewayVpcLinks.note: not on overview/VPC-detail; version, status, targetArns, securityGroupIds only in panel/edges

latticeServiceNetworks.label: node · focus only
latticeServiceNetworks.note: not on overview/VPC-detail; authType, counts, association statuses only in panel

latticeServices.label: node · focus only (as edge endpoint)
latticeServices.note: customDomainName, status, authType only in panel

logGroups.label: panel-only — collection not drawn
logGroups.note: a log-group node appears in focus only if a flow log's logGroupName matches; retentionDays, kmsKeyId, logGroupClass panel-only

cognitoUserPools.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
cognitoUserPools.note: identity-tier auth config; not yet drawn on the graph

cognitoIdentityPools.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
cognitoIdentityPools.note: federated identity → IAM role mapping; not yet drawn on the graph

ecrRepositories.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
ecrRepositories.note: repository + resource policies (cross-account grants); not yet drawn on the graph

ecrRegistries.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
ecrRegistries.note: registry replication + pull-through-cache + scanning config; not yet drawn

snsTopics.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
snsTopics.note: topic policy + subscriptions (cross-account destinations); subscriber ARNs could later be edges

sqsQueues.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
sqsQueues.note: queue policy, encryption, DLQ redrive; DLQ target could later be an edge

eventBuses.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
eventBuses.note: bus policy + rules with target ARNs (cross-account event flow); rule→target could later be edges

eventBridgePipes.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
eventBridgePipes.note: source→enrichment→target ARNs; self-managed-Kafka VPC config could later be drawn

eventBridgeSchedules.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
eventBridgeSchedules.note: schedule → target ARN (cross-account); not yet drawn

sfnStateMachines.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
sfnStateMachines.note: role, logging/tracing/KMS, and downstream integration ARNs parsed from the state-machine definition; integrations could later be edges

glueConnections.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
glueConnections.note: VPC-ATTACHED (subnet+SGs) — candidate to draw on the drill-down graph

glueDevEndpoints.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
glueDevEndpoints.note: VPC-ATTACHED (vpc/subnet/SGs) — candidate to draw on the drill-down graph

glueJobs.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
glueJobs.note: ETL jobs; connection refs to VPC-attached Glue connections

glueDatabases.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
glueDatabases.note: data-catalog databases (tables deliberately not enumerated — fan-out)

dmsReplicationInstances.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
dmsReplicationInstances.note: VPC-ATTACHED (subnet group + SGs) — candidate to draw on the drill-down graph

dmsEndpoints.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
dmsEndpoints.note: source/target DB endpoints; task source→target could later be edges

dataSyncAgents.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
dataSyncAgents.note: VPC-ATTACHED when PrivateLink (subnet+SG ARNs) — candidate to draw on drill-down

dataSyncLocations.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
dataSyncLocations.note: EFS/FSx locations are VPC-attached (subnet+SG) — candidate to draw

dataSyncTasks.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
dataSyncTasks.note: source→destination transfer; could later be edges

firehoseDeliveryStreams.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
firehoseDeliveryStreams.note: VPC-ATTACHED when destination is in-VPC OpenSearch/Elasticsearch (subnet+SG) — candidate to draw

configRecorders.label: panel-only — searchable inventory + details
configRecorders.note: whether Config recording is on, what it records, and where it delivers — governance posture

generic.label: panel-only — Inventory list, grouped by service
generic.note: ARN / resourceType / tags / source only in panel; never on any graph view

directConnectGateways.label: node · overview + focus
directConnectGateways.note: off-diagram: amazonSideAsn, state, ownerAccount, associations[] detail

hostedZones.label: node · overview + focus
hostedZones.note: HIGH-VALUE GAP: records[] (the actual DNS records — name/type/ttl/values/aliasTarget) and recordsTruncated only in panel

s3Buckets.label: node · overview (capped 6) + focus (as CF origin)
s3Buckets.note: creationDate only in panel; >6 buckets collapsed to a note

iamRoles.label: node · overview (capped 8) + VPC-detail + focus
iamRoles.note: off-diagram: path, assumeRolePolicyDocument (parsed for trust only), attachedManagedPolicyArns, inlinePolicyNames, maxSessionDuration, lastUsed

iamUsers.label: node · overview (capped 8) + focus
iamUsers.note: off-diagram: path, passwordLastUsed, hasConsoleAccess; mfaDeviceCount/accessKeyIds only drive badges

cloudFrontDistributions.label: node · overview + VPC-detail + focus
cloudFrontDistributions.note: off-diagram: status, priceClass, originDetails, aliases (edge label only)

globalAccelerators.label: node · overview + focus
globalAccelerators.note: off-diagram: ipAddresses, ipAddressType, status, listeners[] (ports, endpoint groups, weights, health)

coreNetworks.label: node · overview + focus
coreNetworks.note: off-diagram: globalNetworkId, state, edges[] (asn/location), attachments[] detail, segment names
